fields.name: SUB-CATEGORY
fields.definition: If this entry leads to a sub-category of UI, the tag reference to that chain of UI goes here

fields.name: PLAYER TRAIT
fields.definition: If this entry leads to player-trait UI, you can use a tag reference to player trait template UI and the player trait category here

fields.name: CATEGORY NAME
fields.definition: string_id name used for the category labelling (used for both sub-category and player-trait references)

fields.name: CATEGORY DESCRIPTION
fields.definition: string_id description used for the category description (used for both sub-category and player-trait references)

fields.name: VALUE-PAIRS
fields.definition: If this entry leads to parameter value editing UI, the tag reference to those text-value pairs goes here

options: survival round template skulls category options
